meaning: adj.不诚实的,不忠实的,不准确的
examples: Have you ever been unfaithful to him?
She was shocked by the discovery that he had been unfaithful.
She wondered if Harry had been unfaithful to her during this long separation.
As I gradually became unfaithful to 60 Minutes, I still tried to catch the end pieces.
Mr Dornan was said to have then attacked his girlfriend, accusing her of being unfaithful.
